sentences.arabic: رَأَى بَدْرٌ إِعْلَانًا عَنْ تَخْفِيضَاتٍ فِي المَلَابِسِ.
sentences.translation: Badr je vidio oglas o popustima na odjeću.
sentences.translationEn: Badr saw an advertisement about discounts on clothes.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ إِلَى المَحَلِّ وَوَجَدَ الأَسْعَارَ مُنْخَفِضَةً جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Otišao je u prodavnicu i pronašao cijene jako niske.
sentences.translationEn: He went to the shop and found prices very low.

sentences.translation: Kupio je košulju i pantalone po dobroj cijeni.
sentences.translationEn: He bought a shirt and trousers at a good price.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ مَسْرُورًا لِأَنَّهُ وَفَّرَ نُقُودًا كَثِيرَةً.
sentences.translation: Bio je zadovoljan što je uštedio puno novca.
sentences.translationEn: He was pleased because he saved a lot of money.
He told his friends about the discounts.
